description_long: This is a metallic fork with a sleek, minimalist design and a uniform golden color throughout its body. The fork features four evenly spaced, straight tines that are sharply defined and extend from a slightly angled neck. The handle is long, flat, and tapers gently towards the end, with a rectangular cross-section and no visible decorative elements or engravings. The surface appears smooth and polished, giving it a refined, modern appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or branding on the fork. The overall construction suggests it is made from a single piece of metal, likely stainless steel with a gold-colored finish.
description: A gold-colored, minimalist metal fork with four straight tines and a smooth, flat handle. The surface is polished and unadorned, giving it a modern look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fork, highlighting the straight handle and the four tines at the end.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the four evenly spaced tines and the flat, rectangular handle profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the fork's length and the alignment of the tines.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the tines and the flat handle, emphasizing the uniform width and straight edges.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is long, flat, and rectangular with a smooth surface and no decorative features or contours, tapering slightly towards the end.
attribute_tine_alignment: The tines are straight, parallel, and evenly spaced with no visible irregularities.
